description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and releases/* branches and on pull requests to master. The workflow has read permissions for repository contents and pull requests. It uses a concurrency group based on the GitHub reference and cancels in-progress jobs. The workflow includes four jobs: ubuntu, ubuntu-arm, msys2, and macos, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-24.04, ubuntu-24.04-arm, windows-2022, and macos-14) and performing similar steps: checking out the code, installing dependencies, configuring, building, and running tests using meson.
